message:
fix(ballast,scheduler): CoW filesystem fallocate bypass + VOI budget=1 fix

1. Ballast on CoW filesystems (btrfs/zfs/bcachefs): fallocate allocates
   zero-filled blocks that are trivially deduplicated, defeating the
   purpose of ballast. Added skip_fallocate flag to BallastManager;
   coordinator sets it when ProvisionStrategy::RandomData is selected.

2. VOI scheduler budget=1: ceil() on exploration_quota_fraction stole
   the entire budget for exploration, leaving zero exploitation slots.
   Changed .min(budget) to .min(budget.saturating_sub(1)) to guarantee
   at least one exploitation slot under pressure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
